name: Latigo Patio Side Table with Tray - Gray/Brown - Threshold™
description:
Update your outdoor space when you add the Latigo Patio Side Table with Tray from Threshold™. This round patio table is constructed with a minimal metal frame wrapped with vertical strands of brown wicker, and is finished off with a black tray nested into the tabletop. Place in between patio chairs for a convenient spot to hold beverages and snacks, and add a potted plant or decorative sculpture for a personalized accent.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
